name: di2va-extension
description: Di2va browser extension — Shimano Di2 gear overlay for Strava

scripts.package:firefox: webpack --mode production && cd dist && zip -r ../di2va-firefox-v$(npm run -s build-version).zip . -x '*.DS_Store'
scripts.package:source: npm run -s build && V=$(npm run -s build-version) && cd .. && zip -r extension/di2va-source-v$V.zip extension/src extension/popup extension/options extension/icons extension/manifest.json extension/webpack.config.js extension/package.json extension/package-lock.json -x '*.DS_Store'
